examples: At the neck of the wrecked deck, the reckoner checked the opaque cheque.
What happens is that the model produces what is known as a "ready reckoner" which is given to the bidders.
This ready reckoner tells each bidder the financial implications of their respective forecasts of how much they think they can increase revenues.
One very interesting question is how much extra capital First Group and the other bidders would have been forced to hold if the department's model and ready reckoner had been correct.
